<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#FF6B9D">
<meta name="description" content="Dashboard keuangan Kadek & Komang menuju financial freedom dengan AI advisor offline">

<!-- PWA -->
<link rel="manifest" href="data:application/manifest+json;base64,">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="K&K Finance">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<title>Kadek & Komang · Dashboard Keuangan</title>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.0/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Fraunces:wght@600;700;900&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500;1,600;1,700&family=Italiana&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }

:root {
  --bg: #0F0F1E; --card: #1A1A2E; --card-2: #232342;
  --accent: #FFD93D; --pink: #FF6B9D; --purple: #C084FC;
  --green: #4ADE80; --red: #F87171; --blue: #60A5FA; --orange: #FB923C;
  --text: #F1F5F9; --muted: #94A3B8; --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
}

body {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); min-height: 100vh;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(at 10% 0%, rgba(255,107,157,0.15) 0px, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 90% 10%, rgba(192,132,252,0.12) 0px, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 50% 100%, rgba(255,217,61,0.08) 0px, transparent 50%);
  padding: 16px 12px 80px; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  padding-top: max(16px, env(safe-area-inset-top));
}

.display { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
.container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

/* ======= HEART ANIMATIONS — AESTHETIC ======= */
.heart-container { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; inset: 0; overflow: hidden; z-index: 1000; }
.float-heart {
  position: absolute; bottom: -40px;
  width: 28px; height: 28px;
  animation: floatUp 4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,107,157,0.45));
}
.float-heart svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
@keyframes floatUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0) rotate(-5deg) scale(0.4); opacity: 0; }
  12% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-40px) translateX(-8px) rotate(2deg) scale(1); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-50vh) translateX(12px) rotate(-3deg) scale(1.15); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-110vh) translateX(-20px) rotate(8deg) scale(0.9); opacity: 0; }
}

/* Couple name — elegant italic serif */
.couple-name {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.005em;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD9C9 0%, #FF6B9D 45%, #FFD93D 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0 0.05em;
}
.couple-name .amp {
  font-family: 'Italiana', 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 0.92em;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  margin: 0 0.12em;
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: -0.04em;
}

/* Aesthetic SVG heart icon */
.heart-icon {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0.9em;
  height: 0.9em;
  vertical-align: -0.08em;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255,107,157,0.4));
  animation: heartBeat 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.heart-icon svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; }
.heart-icon-lg { width: 1.4em; height: 1.4em; }
.heart-icon-xl { width: 64px; height: 64px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(255,107,157,0.5)); }

@keyframes heartBeat {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,107,157,0.35)); }
  20% { transform: scale(1.08); }
  40% { transform: scale(1); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.12); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(255,107,157,0.65)); }
  60% { transform: scale(1); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,107,157,0.35)); }
}

/* Heart between names — subtle pulse */
.name-heart {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0.7em;
  height: 0.7em;
  margin: 0 0.25em;
  vertical-align: 0.05em;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,107,157,0.5));
  animation: namePulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.name-heart svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; }
@keyframes namePulse {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(-2deg); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.15) rotate(2deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(255,217,61,0.7)); }
}

/* Big breathing heart for welcome */
.welcome-heart {
  width: 80px; height: 80px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(255,107,157,0.5));
  animation: welcomeBreathe 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.welcome-heart svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; }
@keyframes welcomeBreathe {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(-3deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255,107,157,0.4)); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(3deg); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 35px rgba(255,217,61,0.6)); }
}

/* ======= HEADER ======= */
.header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 20px; gap: 12px; }
.header h1 {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Fraunces', serif;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 7vw, 44px);
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.005em;
}
.header h1 .greeting {
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 400;
  opacity: 0.9;
}
.header p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; margin-top: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
.icon-btn { padding: 11px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer; color: var(--text); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 0.2s; font-size: 18px; }
.icon-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); }

/* ======= MONTH BAR ======= */
.month-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 14px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.month-bar button { padding: 8px 12px; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; }
.month-bar button:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
.month-info { text-align: center; }
.month-info .lbl { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 600; }
.month-info .val { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }

/* ======= TABS ======= */
.tabs { display: flex; gap: 6px; overflow-x: auto; -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; padding-bottom: 4px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.tab { padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; white-space: nowrap; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; font-family: inherit; }
.tab.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C); color: #000; border-color: transparent; }
.tab.ai-tab { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C084FC, #FF6B9D); color: #fff; }
.tab.ai-tab.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C); color: #000; }

/* ======= CARD ======= */
.card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.card-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.card-title .dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); }

/* ======= GRID ======= */
.grid { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
.grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
.grid-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
.grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .grid-md-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .grid-md-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
  .grid-md-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
  .grid-hero { grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr; }
}

/* ======= HERO ======= */
.hero-balance { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B9D 0%, #C084FC 50%, #6366F1 100%); padding: 24px; border-radius: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 160px; cursor: pointer; }
.hero-balance::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50%; right: -20%; width: 300px; height: 300px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,217,61,0.3), transparent 70%); border-radius: 50%; }
.hero-balance .lbl { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; opacity: 0.9; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-bottom: 8px; position: relative; }
.hero-balance .amt { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: clamp(30px, 7vw, 46px); font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 12px; position: relative; line-height: 1; }
.hero-balance .pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; position: relative; }
.pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }

/* ======= DONUT ======= */
.donut-wrap { position: relative; height: 160px; }
.donut-center { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; pointer-events: none; }
.donut-center .lbl { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 700; }
.donut-center .val { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 2px; }

/* ======= STAT ======= */
.stat { padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.stat::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 3px; height: 100%; background: var(--accent); }
.stat.green::before { background: var(--green); }
.stat.red::before { background: var(--red); }
.stat.blue::before { background: var(--blue); }
.stat.purple::before { background: var(--purple); }
.stat-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.stat .green-bg { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.15); }
.stat .red-bg { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.15); }
.stat .blue-bg { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.15); }
.stat .purple-bg { background: rgba(192,132,252,0.15); }
.stat-lbl { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 700; }
.stat-val { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 4px; }
.stat-sub { font-size: 10px; color: #64748B; margin-top: 2px; }

/* ======= INPUT ROW ======= */
.input-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card-2); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.input-row .ico { font-size: 20px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.input-row .body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.input-row .body .lbl { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.input-row input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; }
.input-row input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }

/* ======= PROGRESS ======= */
.progress { height: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; margin: 10px 0; position: relative; }
.progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--pink), var(--accent)); border-radius: 999px; transition: width 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.progress-fill::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.4), transparent); animation: shine 2s infinite; }
@keyframes shine { 0% { transform: translateX(-100%); } 100% { transform: translateX(100%); } }

/* ======= MILESTONE ======= */
.milestone { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 11px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.milestone .ico { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 14px; }
.milestone .text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; }
.milestone .pct { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }
.m-done .ico { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.2); color: var(--green); }
.m-active .ico { background: rgba(255,217,61,0.2); color: var(--accent); }
.m-todo .ico { background: rgba(148,163,184,0.15); color: var(--muted); }

/* ======= HEALTH ======= */
.health-item { padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center; }
.health-circle { width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0 auto 8px; position: relative; }
.health-lbl { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; }
.health-target { font-size: 10px; color: #64748B; margin-top: 1px; }
.health-status { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; }
.s-good { color: var(--green); } .s-warn { color: var(--orange); } .s-bad { color: var(--red); }

/* ======= TIP ======= */
.tip { padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,107,157,0.15), rgba(192,132,252,0.15)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,157,0.3); display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.tip-ico { font-size: 22px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.tip-text { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }

/* ======= AI ADVISOR ======= */
.ai-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C084FC 0%, #FF6B9D 50%, #FFD93D 100%);
  padding: 24px; border-radius: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 12px; color: #fff;
}
.ai-hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -30%; left: -10%; width: 200px; height: 200px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.25), transparent 70%); border-radius: 50%; }
.ai-hero .ai-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 6px; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.ai-hero .ai-sub { font-size: 13px; opacity: 0.9; position: relative; }

.score-ring { width: 140px; height: 140px; position: relative; margin: 0 auto; }
.score-text { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.score-num { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }
.score-max { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

.insight-item { padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; }
.insight-item .i-ico { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.insight-item .i-body { flex: 1; }
.insight-item .i-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.insight-item .i-text { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; }
.insight-good { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.2); }
.insight-good .i-ico { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.25); color: var(--green); }
.insight-good .i-title { color: var(--green); }
.insight-warn { background: rgba(251,146,60,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(251,146,60,0.2); }
.insight-warn .i-ico { background: rgba(251,146,60,0.25); color: var(--orange); }
.insight-warn .i-title { color: var(--orange); }
.insight-bad { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2); }
.insight-bad .i-ico { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.25); color: var(--red); }
.insight-bad .i-title { color: var(--red); }
.insight-info { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.2); }
.insight-info .i-ico { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.25); color: var(--blue); }
.insight-info .i-title { color: var(--blue); }

.action-card { padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card-2); margin-bottom: 8px; border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); }
.action-card .a-num { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--accent); color: #000; font-weight: 800; font-size: 12px; margin-right: 8px; }
.action-card .a-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.action-card .a-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.action-card .a-impact { font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(255,217,61,0.15); color: var(--accent); border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 700; display: inline-block; }

.qa-item { padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card-2); margin-bottom: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; }
.qa-item:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
.qa-q { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.qa-q .arrow { transition: transform 0.3s; color: var(--muted); }
.qa-item.open .qa-q .arrow { transform: rotate(90deg); }
.qa-a { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.3s, margin-top 0.3s; }
.qa-item.open .qa-a { max-height: 500px; margin-top: 10px; }

/* ======= MODAL ======= */
.modal-bg { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); z-index: 100; display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; padding: 0; }
.modal-bg.active { display: flex; }
@media (min-width: 768px) { .modal-bg { align-items: center; padding: 16px; } }
.modal { background: var(--card); border-top-left-radius: 24px; border-top-right-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; width: 100%; max-width: 480px; max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; }
@media (min-width: 768px) { .modal { border-radius: 24px; } }
.modal-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.modal-head h2 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; }
.modal-head button { background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--text); padding: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; }
.field { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.field label { display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
.field input { width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; background: var(--card-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }
.field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }
.btn { padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; font-family: inherit; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; }
.btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--orange)); color: #000; }
.btn-secondary { background: var(--card-2); color: var(--text); }
.btn-danger { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.1); color: var(--red); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2); }
.btn-full { width: 100%; }

.toast { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; z-index: 200; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4ADE80, #22D3EE); color: #000; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(74,222,128,0.3); }
.toast.show { opacity: 1; }

.history-item { padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card-2); margin-bottom: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; }
.history-item:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
.history-item .top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.history-item .top .name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; }
.history-item .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; }
.history-item .col { font-size: 11px; }
.history-item .col .l { color: var(--muted); }
.history-item .col .v { font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 2px; }

.empty { padding: 30px; text-align: center; color: #64748B; }
.empty-icon { font-size: 36px; opacity: 0.5; margin-bottom: 8px; }

.fade-up { animation: fadeUp 0.4s ease-out; }
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.hidden { display: none !important; }

footer { text-align: center; margin-top: 30px; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.6; }

/* PWA install banner */
.install-banner { position: fixed; bottom: 16px; left: 16px; right: 16px; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 12px 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C); color: #000; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(255,217,61,0.3); display: none; align-items: center; gap: 10px; z-index: 99; }
.install-banner.show { display: flex; }
.install-banner .text { flex: 1; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; }
.install-banner button { padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: #000; color: #FFD93D; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; }
.install-banner .close { background: transparent; color: #000; padding: 6px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Reusable SVG defs for aesthetic hearts -->
<svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute" aria-hidden="true">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g-heart-pink" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFB1CB"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#FF6B9D"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFD93D"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="g-heart-purple" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E9D5FF"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#C084FC"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FF6B9D"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="g-heart-gold" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFF7CC"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#FFD93D"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FB923C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="g-heart-rose" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FCA5A5"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#EC4899"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <symbol id="heart-shape" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
      <path d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/>
    </symbol>
  </defs>
</svg>

<!-- Floating heart container -->
<div class="heart-container" id="heart-container"></div>

<div class="container">

  <header class="header fade-up">
    <div>
      <h1><span class="greeting">Hai,</span><br><span class="couple-name" onclick="rainHearts()">Kadek<span class="amp">&amp;</span>Komang</span></h1>
      <p><span class="heart-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="url(#g-heart-pink)" d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg></span> Menuju Financial Freedom</p>
    </div>
    <button class="icon-btn" onclick="openSettings()" aria-label="Settings">⚙️</button>
  </header>

  <div class="month-bar fade-up">
    <button onclick="navigateMonth(-1)" aria-label="Bulan sebelumnya">‹</button>
    <div class="month-info">
      <div class="lbl">Bulan Aktif</div>
      <div class="val" id="month-label">—</div>
    </div>
    <button onclick="navigateMonth(1)" aria-label="Bulan berikutnya">›</button>
  </div>

  <div class="tabs fade-up" id="tabs">
    <button class="tab active" data-tab="dashboard">✨ Dashboard</button>
    <button class="tab ai-tab" data-tab="ai">🤖 AI Advisor</button>
    <button class="tab" data-tab="income">📈 Pemasukan</button>
    <button class="tab" data-tab="expense">📉 Pengeluaran</button>
    <button class="tab" data-tab="networth">💰 Net Worth</button>
    <button class="tab" data-tab="goals">🎯 Target</button>
    <button class="tab" data-tab="history">📅 Histori</button>
  </div>

  <main id="main"></main>

  <footer>
    <span style="font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7;">"Pasangan yang berhasil bukan yang tidak pernah salah,<br>tapi yang selalu jujur dan terus berjalan bareng."</span><br><br>
    <span style="opacity: 0.6; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;">
      <span style="font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic;">Kadek &amp; Komang</span>
      <span class="heart-icon" style="width: 0.85em; height: 0.85em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="url(#g-heart-pink)" d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg></span>
    </span>
  </footer>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Tersimpan otomatis</div>

<!-- Install Banner -->
<div class="install-banner" id="install-banner">
  <span style="font-size: 22px;">📲</span>
  <div class="text">Pasang sebagai aplikasi?</div>
  <button onclick="installPWA()">Pasang</button>
  <button class="close" onclick="document.getElementById('install-banner').classList.remove('show')">✕</button>
</div>

<!-- SETTINGS MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="settings-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-head">
      <h2>⚙️ Pengaturan</h2>
      <button onclick="closeModal('settings-modal')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Nama Pasangan 1</label>
      <input type="text" id="set-p1">
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Nama Pasangan 2</label>
      <input type="text" id="set-p2">
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Target Financial Freedom (Rp)</label>
      <input type="number" id="set-target" inputmode="numeric">
    </div>
    <div style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 16px; margin-top: 8px;">
      <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Backup & Restore</div>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="exportData()">📥 Export</button>
        <label class="btn btn-secondary" style="cursor: pointer;">
          📤 Import
          <input type="file" accept=".json" onchange="importData(event)" style="display:none">
        </label>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-full" onclick="window.print()" style="margin-bottom: 10px;">🖨️ Print / Save PDF</button>
      <button class="btn btn-danger btn-full" onclick="resetData()">🗑️ Reset Semua Data</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WELCOME MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="welcome-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-head">
      <h2>🎉 Selamat Datang!</h2>
      <button onclick="closeWelcome()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 12px 0 20px; margin-bottom: 14px;">
      <div class="welcome-heart">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="url(#g-heart-pink)" d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top: 16px;">
        <span class="couple-name" style="font-size: 32px;">Kadek<span class="amp">&amp;</span>Komang</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Tim impian menuju financial freedom</div>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 14px;">
      Aplikasi ini akan jadi <strong style="color: var(--accent);">"otak keuangan"</strong> kalian berdua. Datanya tersimpan otomatis, ada AI Advisor offline yang bantu analisis, dan bisa dipasang sebagai aplikasi di HP.
    </p>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">🤖</span> AI Advisor offline yang nganalisis keuangan</div>
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">📊</span> Grafik visual yang gampang dipahami</div>
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">💾</span> Data tersimpan otomatis di HP kalian</div>
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">🌐</span> Bisa dipakai offline tanpa internet</div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-full" onclick="closeWelcome()">Mulai Sekarang →</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ============= CONSTANTS =============
const MONTHS_ID = ['Januari','Februari','Maret','April','Mei','Juni','Juli','Agustus','September','Oktober','November','Desember'];
const STORAGE_KEY = 'kk_finance_v1';

const INCOME_CATS = [
  { key: 'salary1', label: 'Gaji Kadek', icon: '💼', color: '#4ADE80' },
  { key: 'salary2', label: 'Gaji Komang', icon: '💼', color: '#22D3EE' },
  { key: 'business', label: 'Bisnis / Side Income', icon: '🚀', color: '#FB923C' },
  { key: 'passive', label: 'Pendapatan Pasif', icon: '📈', color: '#A78BFA' },
  { key: 'other', label: 'Lain-lain', icon: '✨', color: '#F472B6' },
];

const EXPENSE_CATS = [
  { key: 'needs', label: 'Kebutuhan Pokok', icon: '🍚', color: '#FF6B9D', type: 'needs' },
  { key: 'housing', label: 'Cicilan/Sewa Rumah', icon: '🏠', color: '#F87171', type: 'needs' },
  { key: 'transport', label: 'Transportasi', icon: '🚗', color: '#FB923C', type: 'needs' },
  { key: 'kids', label: 'Anak & Pendidikan', icon: '👶', color: '#60A5FA', type: 'needs' },
  { key: 'health', label: 'Kesehatan & Asuransi', icon: '🏥', color: '#34D399', type: 'needs' },
  { key: 'fun', label: 'Hiburan & Lifestyle', icon: '🎉', color: '#C084FC', type: 'wants' },
  { key: 'charity', label: 'Sedekah & Sosial', icon: '❤️', color: '#F472B6', type: 'savings' },
  { key: 'invest', label: 'Investasi & Tabungan', icon: '💰', color: '#FBBF24', type: 'savings' },
  { key: 'other', label: 'Lain-lain', icon: '📦', color: '#94A3B8', type: 'wants' },
];

const ASSET_CATS = [
  { key: 'cash', label: 'Tabungan & Bank', icon: '🏦' },
  { key: 'emergency', label: 'Dana Darurat', icon: '🚨' },
  { key: 'investment', label: 'Investasi (Saham/RD)', icon: '📊' },
  { key: 'gold', label: 'Emas / Logam Mulia', icon: '🥇' },
  { key: 'property', label: 'Properti', icon: '🏡' },
  { key: 'business', label: 'Bisnis / Usaha', icon: '🏢' },
  { key: 'vehicle', label: 'Kendaraan', icon: '🚙' },
];

const DEBT_CATS = [
  { key: 'mortgage', label: 'KPR / Kredit Rumah', icon: '🏠' },
  { key: 'vehicle', label: 'Kredit Kendaraan', icon: '🚗' },
  { key: 'card', label: 'Kartu Kredit', icon: '💳' },
  { key: 'kta', label: 'KTA / Pinjaman', icon: '📝' },
  { key: 'other', label: 'Utang Lain', icon: '📋' },
];

// ============= HELPERS =============
const fmt = n => 'Rp ' + Math.round(n || 0).toLocaleString('id-ID');
const fmtShort = n => {
  n = +n || 0;
  const abs = Math.abs(n);
  const sign = n < 0 ? '-' : '';
  if (abs >= 1e9) return sign + 'Rp ' + (abs/1e9).toFixed(1) + 'M';
  if (abs >= 1e6) return sign + 'Rp ' + (abs/1e6).toFixed(1) + 'jt';
  if (abs >= 1e3) return sign + 'Rp ' + (abs/1e3).toFixed(0) + 'rb';
  return sign + 'Rp ' + abs;
};

const monthKey = d => `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}`;
const monthLabel = k => { const [y, m] = k.split('-'); return `${MONTHS_ID[parseInt(m)-1]} ${y}`; };

const emptyMonth = () => ({
  income: Object.fromEntries(INCOME_CATS.map(c => [c.key, 0])),
  expense: Object.fromEntries(EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => [c.key, 0])),
  budget: Object.fromEntries(EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => [c.key, 0])),
  assets: Object.fromEntries(ASSET_CATS.map(c => [c.key, 0])),
  debts: Object.fromEntries(DEBT_CATS.map(c => [c.key, 0])),
});

const defaultData = () => {
  const k = monthKey(new Date());
  return {
    months: { [k]: emptyMonth() },
    settings: { target: 5000000000, partner1: 'Kadek', partner2: 'Komang' }
  };
};

let state = { data: defaultData(), currentMonth: monthKey(new Date()), activeTab: 'dashboard', charts: {} };

// ============= HEART ANIMATIONS — AESTHETIC SVG =============
const HEART_GRADIENTS = ['g-heart-pink', 'g-heart-purple', 'g-heart-gold', 'g-heart-rose'];

function spawnHeart(gradId = null, leftPct = null) {
  const c = document.getElementById('heart-container');
  const grad = gradId || HEART_GRADIENTS[Math.floor(Math.random() * HEART_GRADIENTS.length)];
  const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
  wrapper.className = 'float-heart';
  const size = 18 + Math.random() * 28;
  wrapper.style.left = (leftPct !== null ? leftPct : Math.random() * 100) + '%';
  wrapper.style.width = size + 'px';
  wrapper.style.height = size + 'px';
  wrapper.style.animationDuration = (3 + Math.random() * 2) + 's';
  wrapper.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 0.3) + 's';
  wrapper.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="url(#${grad})" d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg>`;
  c.appendChild(wrapper);
  setTimeout(() => wrapper.remove(), 5500);
}

function rainHearts(count = 14) {
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    setTimeout(() => spawnHeart(), i * 90);
  }
}

function celebrate() { rainHearts(24); }

// ============= STORAGE =============
function loadData() {
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (raw) { state.data = JSON.parse(raw); return true; }
  } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  return false;
}

function saveData(silent) {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state.data));
    if (!silent) showToast();
  } catch (e) {
    alert('Gagal menyimpan: ' + e.message);
  }
}

function showToast(msg = '✓ Tersimpan otomatis') {
  const t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent = msg;
  t.classList.add('show');
  clearTimeout(showToast.t);
  showToast.t = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 1500);
}

// ============= COMPUTED =============
function getCurrentMonth() {
  if (!state.data.months[state.currentMonth]) {
    state.data.months[state.currentMonth] = emptyMonth();
    saveData(true);
  }
  return state.data.months[state.currentMonth];
}

function getTotals() {
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const income = Object.values(cur.income).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
  const expense = Object.values(cur.expense).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
  const assets = Object.values(cur.assets).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
  const debts = Object.values(cur.debts).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
  const surplus = income - expense;
  const savingsRate = income > 0 ? surplus / income : 0;
  const netWorth = assets - debts;
  const debtRatio = assets > 0 ? debts / assets : 0;
  const targetPct = state.data.settings.target > 0 ? netWorth / state.data.settings.target : 0;
  const emergencyMonths = expense > 0 ? (cur.assets.emergency || 0) / expense : 0;
  const investAmount = +cur.expense.invest || 0;
  const investRate = income > 0 ? investAmount / income : 0;
  return { income, expense, assets, debts, surplus, savingsRate, netWorth, debtRatio, targetPct, emergencyMonths, investAmount, investRate };
}

function getTrendData() {
  const sorted = Object.keys(state.data.months).sort();
  return sorted.slice(-12).map(k => {
    const m = state.data.months[k];
    const inc = Object.values(m.income).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
    const exp = Object.values(m.expense).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
    const assets = Object.values(m.assets).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
    const debts = Object.values(m.debts).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
    const [, mo] = k.split('-');
    return { month: MONTHS_ID[parseInt(mo)-1].slice(0,3), key: k, income: inc, expense: exp, surplus: inc-exp, netWorth: assets-debts };
  });
}

// ============= AI ADVISOR (OFFLINE LOGIC) =============
function aiAnalyze() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const trend = getTrendData();
  
  // ===== HEALTH SCORE (0-100) =====
  let score = 0;
  if (t.income > 0) {
    // Savings rate (30 pts)
    if (t.savingsRate >= 0.30) score += 30;
    else if (t.savingsRate >= 0.20) score += 25;
    else if (t.savingsRate >= 0.10) score += 15;
    else if (t.savingsRate >= 0) score += 5;
    
    // Debt ratio (20 pts)
    if (t.assets === 0 && t.debts === 0) score += 10;
    else if (t.debtRatio <= 0.20) score += 20;
    else if (t.debtRatio <= 0.40) score += 15;
    else if (t.debtRatio <= 0.60) score += 10;
    else if (t.debtRatio <= 0.80) score += 5;
    
    // Emergency fund (20 pts)
    if (t.emergencyMonths >= 12) score += 20;
    else if (t.emergencyMonths >= 6) score += 15;
    else if (t.emergencyMonths >= 3) score += 10;
    else if (t.emergencyMonths >= 1) score += 5;
    
    // Investment rate (15 pts)
    if (t.investRate >= 0.20) score += 15;
    else if (t.investRate >= 0.10) score += 10;
    else if (t.investRate >= 0.05) score += 5;
    
    // Net worth growth (15 pts)
    if (trend.length >= 2) {
      const prev = trend[trend.length - 2].netWorth;
      const now = trend[trend.length - 1].netWorth;
      if (now > prev) score += 15;
      else if (now === prev) score += 8;
    } else {
      score += 8; // Neutral if no history
    }
  }
  
  // ===== STRENGTHS (apa yang sudah bagus) =====
  const strengths = [];
  if (t.savingsRate >= 0.20) strengths.push({ icon: '💪', title: 'Tingkat tabungan sehat', text: `${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(0)}% dari pemasukan ditabung. Di atas standar ideal 20%.` });
  if (t.debts === 0) strengths.push({ icon: '🎯', title: 'Bebas utang!', text: 'Tidak ada utang sama sekali. Ini fondasi kuat untuk financial freedom.' });
  else if (t.debtRatio <= 0.30) strengths.push({ icon: '✅', title: 'Rasio utang aman', text: `Utang hanya ${(t.debtRatio*100).toFixed(0)}% dari aset, masih dalam zona aman.` });
  if (t.emergencyMonths >= 6) strengths.push({ icon: '🛡️', title: 'Dana darurat solid', text: `${t.emergencyMonths.toFixed(1)} bulan biaya hidup tersedia. Aman menghadapi kejutan.` });
  if (t.investRate >= 0.10) strengths.push({ icon: '📈', title: 'Investasi konsisten', text: `${(t.investRate*100).toFixed(0)}% pemasukan masuk investasi (${fmtShort(t.investAmount)}/bulan).` });
  if (trend.length >= 2) {
    const growth = trend[trend.length - 1].netWorth - trend[trend.length - 2].netWorth;
    if (growth > 0) strengths.push({ icon: '🚀', title: 'Net worth bertumbuh', text: `Naik ${fmtShort(growth)} dari bulan lalu. Trend yang bagus, pertahankan!` });
  }
  if (t.income > 0 && (+cur.income.passive || 0) > 0) strengths.push({ icon: '💎', title: 'Sudah punya pendapatan pasif', text: `${fmtShort(+cur.income.passive)}/bulan. Kunci financial freedom!` });
  if (t.income > 0 && (+cur.income.business || 0) > 0) strengths.push({ icon: '🚀', title: 'Punya side income', text: `Bisnis/sampingan menghasilkan ${fmtShort(+cur.income.business)}/bulan. Pertumbuhan besar!` });
  
  // ===== WEAKNESSES (yang perlu diperbaiki) =====
  const weaknesses = [];
  
  if (t.income === 0) {
    weaknesses.push({ icon: '⚠️', title: 'Belum ada data pemasukan', text: 'Mulai isi tab Pemasukan agar AI bisa analisis lebih akurat.', severity: 'warn' });
  } else {
    if (t.savingsRate < 0.10) weaknesses.push({ icon: '📉', title: 'Tabungan terlalu rendah', text: `Hanya ${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(0)}% dari pemasukan ditabung. Target minimal 10%, ideal 20%.`, severity: 'bad' });
    else if (t.savingsRate < 0.20) weaknesses.push({ icon: '📊', title: 'Tabungan masih bisa dinaikkan', text: `${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(0)}% sudah cukup, tapi target ideal 20%+ untuk akselerasi.`, severity: 'warn' });
    
    if (t.surplus < 0) weaknesses.push({ icon: '🚨', title: 'Pengeluaran melebihi pemasukan!', text: `Defisit ${fmtShort(-t.surplus)}. Ini darurat — review segera pengeluaran terbesar.`, severity: 'bad' });
    
    if (t.emergencyMonths < 3 && t.expense > 0) weaknesses.push({ icon: '⛑️', title: 'Dana darurat masih kurang', text: `Baru ${t.emergencyMonths.toFixed(1)} bulan, target minimal 3 bulan dulu, lalu naik ke 6 bulan.`, severity: 'warn' });
    
    if (t.debtRatio > 0.50) weaknesses.push({ icon: '⛓️', title: 'Rasio utang tinggi', text: `Utang ${(t.debtRatio*100).toFixed(0)}% dari aset. Di atas zona aman 30%, mulai prioritaskan pelunasan.`, severity: 'bad' });
    else if (t.debtRatio > 0.30) weaknesses.push({ icon: '⚠️', title: 'Rasio utang perlu diturunkan', text: `${(t.debtRatio*100).toFixed(0)}% — masih tergolong tinggi, target di bawah 30%.`, severity: 'warn' });
    
    // Lifestyle checking
    const wantsTotal = EXPENSE_CATS.filter(c => c.type === 'wants').reduce((a, c) => a + (+cur.expense[c.key] || 0), 0);
    const wantsRatio = t.income > 0 ? wantsTotal / t.income : 0;
    if (wantsRatio > 0.30) weaknesses.push({ icon: '🎉', title: 'Pengeluaran lifestyle tinggi', text: `Hiburan & lain-lain ${(wantsRatio*100).toFixed(0)}% dari pemasukan. Idealnya maksimal 30%.`, severity: 'warn' });
    
    if (t.investAmount === 0 && t.income > 0) weaknesses.push({ icon: '💸', title: 'Belum ada investasi', text: 'Bulan ini belum ada anggaran investasi. Mulai dari yang kecil aja, misal 5-10% pemasukan.', severity: 'warn' });
    
    // Concentration risk
    const expByCat = EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => ({ name: c.label, val: +cur.expense[c.key] || 0 }));
    const biggest = expByCat.sort((a, b) => b.val - a.val)[0];
    if (biggest && biggest.val > t.income * 0.40 && t.income > 0) {
      weaknesses.push({ icon: '🎯', title: `${biggest.name} terlalu dominan`, text: `Mengambil ${(biggest.val/t.income*100).toFixed(0)}% pemasukan. Risiko terlalu terpusat di satu pos.`, severity: 'warn' });
    }
  }
  
  // ===== TOP ACTIONS (rekomendasi top 3 by impact) =====
  const actions = [];
  
  if (t.surplus < 0) {
    actions.push({
      title: 'Pangkas pengeluaran terbesar segera',
      desc: 'Defisit harus diatasi dulu sebelum mikirin investasi. Review tab Pengeluaran, identifikasi 1-2 kategori yang bisa dipangkas 20-30%.',
      impact: `Hemat ${fmtShort(Math.abs(t.surplus))}/bulan`,
      priority: 1
    });
  }
  
  if (t.debtRatio > 0.30) {
    const monthlyDebtBudget = t.surplus > 0 ? Math.min(t.surplus * 0.5, t.debts * 0.05) : t.debts * 0.03;
    actions.push({
      title: 'Prioritaskan pelunasan utang',
      desc: 'Pakai metode "snowball" (lunasi yang terkecil dulu) atau "avalanche" (yang bunga tertinggi dulu). Kartu kredit & KTA biasanya prioritas utama.',
      impact: `Hemat bunga ribuan-jutaan rupiah`,
      priority: 1
    });
  }
  
  if (t.emergencyMonths < 6 && t.expense > 0) {
    const target = t.expense * 6 - (+cur.assets.emergency || 0);
    const monthsNeeded = t.surplus > 0 ? Math.ceil(target / Math.max(t.surplus * 0.4, 100000)) : 0;
    actions.push({
      title: 'Bangun dana darurat ke 6 bulan',
      desc: `Sisihkan minimal 40% dari surplus ke dana darurat. Simpan di rekening terpisah, jangan dicampur, jangan diinvestasikan (karena harus likuid).`,
      impact: monthsNeeded > 0 ? `Tercapai dalam ~${monthsNeeded} bulan` : `Butuh tambah ${fmtShort(target)}`,
      priority: 2
    });
  }
  
  if (t.investRate < 0.10 && t.surplus > 0) {
    actions.push({
      title: 'Mulai/Naikkan investasi rutin',
      desc: 'Auto-debet ke reksadana atau saham tiap tanggal gajian. Mulai dari 5-10% pemasukan. Pakai prinsip dollar cost averaging — konsisten lebih penting dari nominal.',
      impact: `Akselerasi target ${Math.floor((0.10 - t.investRate) * 100)}+ tahun`,
      priority: 2
    });
  }
  
  if (t.savingsRate >= 0.20 && t.debts === 0) {
    actions.push({
      title: 'Diversifikasi investasi',
      desc: 'Sudah disiplin nabung, saatnya naikkan kelas. Mix portofolio: 60% reksadana saham (long-term), 30% obligasi/deposito, 10% emas. Atau coba properti kalau dana cukup.',
      impact: `Imbal hasil naik 2-5%/tahun`,
      priority: 3
    });
  }
  
  if (t.income > 0 && (+cur.income.passive || 0) === 0) {
    actions.push({
      title: 'Bangun pendapatan pasif',
      desc: 'Mulai dari yang kecil: dividen saham, bunga deposito, sewa kos, royalti, atau bisnis online yang bisa di-autopilot. Target: pendapatan pasif > pengeluaran = financial freedom!',
      impact: `Long-term game changer`,
      priority: 3
    });
  }
  
  // Lifestyle reduction
  const wantsTotal = EXPENSE_CATS.filter(c => c.type === 'wants').reduce((a, c) => a + (+cur.expense[c.key] || 0), 0);
  if (wantsTotal > t.income * 0.30 && t.income > 0) {
    const cut = wantsTotal * 0.20;
    actions.push({
      title: 'Pangkas lifestyle 20%',
      desc: 'Hiburan & lifestyle saat ini di atas 30% pemasukan. Coba "no-spend challenge" — 1 minggu tanpa belanja non-esensial. Bayangkan dampaknya kalau dialihkan ke investasi!',
      impact: `Hemat ${fmtShort(cut)}/bulan`,
      priority: 2
    });
  }
  
  // ===== FORECASTING =====
  let forecast = null;
  if (t.surplus > 0 && t.netWorth < state.data.settings.target) {
    const remaining = state.data.settings.target - t.netWorth;
    const baseMonths = remaining / t.surplus;
    forecast = {
      base: baseMonths / 12,
      better: (remaining / (t.surplus * 1.20)) / 12,
      best: (remaining / (t.surplus * 1.50)) / 12,
      ifIncomeUp: (remaining / (t.surplus + t.income * 0.20)) / 12,
    };
  }
  
  // ===== Q&A =====
  const qa = generateQA(t, cur, trend);
  
  return { score: Math.round(score), strengths: strengths.slice(0, 5), weaknesses: weaknesses.slice(0, 5), actions: actions.sort((a,b) => a.priority - b.priority).slice(0, 4), forecast, qa };
}

function generateQA(t, cur, trend) {
  const qa = [];
  
  // Q1: Apakah keuangan saya sehat?
  let healthAns;
  if (t.income === 0) healthAns = "Belum bisa dianalisis karena belum ada data pemasukan. Yuk mulai isi tab Pemasukan dulu!";
  else {
    const score = aiAnalyze().score;
    if (score >= 75) healthAns = `Keuangan kalian SEHAT (skor ${score}/100)! Pertahankan disiplin dan terus optimasi area yang masih bisa ditingkatkan.`;
    else if (score >= 50) healthAns = `Keuangan kalian CUKUP (skor ${score}/100). Ada area yang sudah bagus, tapi beberapa hal perlu perbaikan. Cek bagian "Yang Perlu Diperbaiki" di atas.`;
    else if (score >= 25) healthAns = `Keuangan kalian PERLU PERHATIAN (skor ${score}/100). Beberapa indikator masuk zona kuning/merah. Fokus ke 3 rekomendasi aksi prioritas dulu.`;
    else healthAns = `Keuangan kalian DARURAT (skor ${score}/100). Tapi tenang, semua bisa diperbaiki — yang penting mulai. Fokus ke aksi #1 dulu, jangan multitasking.`;
  }
  qa.push({ q: '🩺 Apakah keuangan kami sehat?', a: healthAns });
  
  // Q2: Kenapa surplus kecil?
  if (t.income > 0) {
    const expByCat = EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => ({ name: c.label, val: +cur.expense[c.key] || 0, ratio: t.income > 0 ? (+cur.expense[c.key] || 0) / t.income : 0 })).sort((a,b) => b.val - a.val);
    const top3 = expByCat.slice(0, 3);
    qa.push({
      q: '💸 Kenapa surplus kami kecil?',
      a: `Berdasarkan data bulan ini, 3 pengeluaran terbesar kalian:\n\n` +
        top3.map((c, i) => `${i+1}. ${c.name}: ${fmtShort(c.val)} (${(c.ratio*100).toFixed(0)}% pemasukan)`).join('\n') +
        `\n\nFokus optimasi di kategori dengan nominal terbesar dulu — pemangkasan 10% di pos terbesar lebih impactful daripada hemat 50% di pos kecil.`
    });
  }
  
  // Q3: Kapan financial freedom?
  if (t.surplus > 0 && t.netWorth < state.data.settings.target) {
    const remaining = state.data.settings.target - t.netWorth;
    const baseMonths = remaining / t.surplus;
    const baseYears = baseMonths / 12;
    qa.push({
      q: '🎯 Kapan kami bisa financial freedom?',
      a: `Dengan tabungan ${fmtShort(t.surplus)}/bulan saat ini, target ${fmtShort(state.data.settings.target)} akan tercapai dalam ~${baseYears.toFixed(1)} tahun.\n\nNote: ini hitungan linear sederhana. Realitanya akan lebih cepat kalau kalian:\n• Investasi yang menghasilkan compound interest\n• Naikkan pemasukan seiring waktu\n• Konsisten kontribusi tiap bulan\n\nCek tab "Target" untuk simulator lengkap.`
    });
  } else if (t.netWorth >= state.data.settings.target) {
    qa.push({ q: '🎯 Kapan kami bisa financial freedom?', a: `🎉 Selamat! Net worth kalian sudah mencapai target ${fmtShort(state.data.settings.target)}. Tinggal pertahankan dan nikmati hasilnya!` });
  }
  
  // Q4: Bagaimana cara hemat efektif?
  qa.push({
    q: '💡 Bagaimana cara hemat yang efektif?',
    a: `5 strategi hemat yang terbukti:\n\n1. Aturan 24 jam — pengeluaran > Rp 500rb tunda 24 jam, 80% pembelian impulsif akan hilang.\n\n2. Otomatisasi tabungan — gajian → langsung auto-debet ke tabungan SEBELUM dipakai.\n\n3. Track 30 hari — catat semua pengeluaran sebulan, biasanya kaget sendiri.\n\n4. Cancel langganan tidak terpakai — Netflix, Spotify, gym yang gak dipakai. Audit tiap 6 bulan.\n\n5. Masak di rumah — beda 3-5x lipat sama makan di luar. Hemat besar tanpa terasa.`
  });
  
  // Q5: Investasi mana yang cocok?
  qa.push({
    q: '📈 Investasi apa yang cocok untuk kami?',
    a: `Tergantung profil risiko dan jangka waktu. Panduan umum:\n\n• Dana darurat: deposito/RDPU (likuid, aman)\n• Tujuan 1-3 tahun: reksadana pasar uang/pendapatan tetap\n• Tujuan 3-10 tahun: campuran reksadana saham + obligasi\n• Tujuan 10+ tahun (pensiun/freedom): mayoritas saham/RDS, bisa tambah properti\n\nUntuk pemula:\n1. Mulai dari reksadana (simple, terdiversifikasi)\n2. Pakai aplikasi resmi terdaftar OJK (Bibit, Bareksa, Ajaib, dll)\n3. DCA — investasi rutin tiap bulan, bukan timing pasar\n4. Jangan all-in di 1 instrumen\n\nDISCLAIMER: Ini bukan saran investasi spesifik. Konsultasi dengan financial planner bersertifikat untuk keputusan besar.`
  });
  
  // Q6: Cara bicara soal uang dengan pasangan?
  qa.push({
    q: '💬 Cara bicara soal uang dengan pasangan?',
    a: `Tips komunikasi keuangan pasangan:\n\n1. Jadwalkan "money date" rutin — sebulan sekali, sambil makan/ngopi, suasana santai.\n\n2. Aturan no-blame — fokus ke "kita mau ke mana", bukan "siapa salah".\n\n3. Transparansi total — semua angka terbuka, tidak ada rahasia keuangan.\n\n4. Set goal bareng dulu, baru strategi — visi yang sama bikin keputusan harian gampang.\n\n5. Hargai perbedaan — biasanya satu lebih hemat, satu lebih spender. Saling melengkapi, bukan konflik.\n\n6. Kalau lagi panas, tunda — keputusan keuangan jangan diambil saat emosi tinggi.\n\nIngat: financial freedom bareng = marathon, bukan sprint. Kompak lebih penting dari cepat.`
  });
  
  return qa;
}

// ============= RENDER =============
function render() {
  document.getElementById('month-label').textContent = monthLabel(state.currentMonth);
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.tab === state.activeTab));
  
  Object.values(state.charts).forEach(c => { try { c.destroy(); } catch(e){} });
  state.charts = {};
  
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  main.innerHTML = '';
  main.classList.add('fade-up');
  setTimeout(() => main.classList.remove('fade-up'), 500);
  
  if (state.activeTab === 'dashboard') renderDashboard();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'ai') renderAI();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'income') renderIncome();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'expense') renderExpense();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'networth') renderNetWorth();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'goals') renderGoals();
  else if (state.activeTab === 'history') renderHistory();
}

// ============= DASHBOARD =============
function renderDashboard() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const trend = getTrendData();
  const savingsHealth = t.savingsRate >= 0.20 ? 'good' : t.savingsRate >= 0.10 ? 'warn' : 'bad';
  const tipText = savingsHealth === 'good'
    ? 'Tingkat tabungan kalian sehat! Coba tap tab AI Advisor untuk dapat saran personal.'
    : savingsHealth === 'warn'
    ? 'Tingkat tabungan masih bisa dinaikkan. AI Advisor punya rekomendasi spesifik buat kalian.'
    : 'Tap tab AI Advisor — saya analisis keuangan kalian dan kasih action plan.';

  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="tip" onclick="state.activeTab='ai'; render();" style="cursor:pointer;">
      <span class="tip-ico">🤖</span>
      <div class="tip-text"><strong style="color: var(--accent)">AI Advisor: </strong>${tipText}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid grid-md-2 grid-hero" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <div class="hero-balance" onclick="rainHearts(8)">
        <div class="lbl">Kekayaan Bersih · <span style="font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.95;">Kadek<span style="margin: 0 0.2em;">&</span>Komang</span></div>
        <div class="amt">${fmt(t.netWorth)}</div>
        <div class="pills">
          <span class="pill">💰 Aset: ${fmtShort(t.assets)}</span>
          <span class="pill">📉 Utang: ${fmtShort(t.debts)}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:0;">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot"></span> Aliran Bulan Ini</div>
        <div class="donut-wrap">
          <canvas id="chart-flow"></canvas>
          <div class="donut-center">
            <div class="lbl">Surplus</div>
            <div class="val" style="color: ${t.surplus >= 0 ? '#4ADE80' : '#F87171'}">${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(0)}%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid grid-4 grid-md-4" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <div class="stat green"><div class="stat-icon green-bg">💰</div><div class="stat-lbl">Pemasukan</div><div class="stat-val">${fmtShort(t.income)}</div><div class="stat-sub">Bulan ini</div></div>
      <div class="stat red"><div class="stat-icon red-bg">💸</div><div class="stat-lbl">Pengeluaran</div><div class="stat-val">${fmtShort(t.expense)}</div><div class="stat-sub">Bulan ini</div></div>
      <div class="stat blue"><div class="stat-icon blue-bg">📈</div><div class="stat-lbl">Tabungan</div><div class="stat-val">${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(1)}%</div><div class="stat-sub">Tingkat menabung</div></div>
      <div class="stat purple"><div class="stat-icon purple-bg">✨</div><div class="stat-lbl">Surplus</div><div class="stat-val">${fmtShort(t.surplus)}</div><div class="stat-sub">Sisa bulan ini</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid grid-md-2" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:0;">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#F87171"></span> Breakdown Pengeluaran</div>
        <div style="height:240px;"><canvas id="chart-expense"></canvas></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:0;">
        <div style="display:flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px;">
          <h3 class="display" style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800;">🚀 Financial Freedom</h3>
          <span style="padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 900; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C); color: #000;">${(t.targetPct * 100).toFixed(1)}%</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size: 11px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px;">
          <span>Sekarang: ${fmtShort(t.netWorth)}</span>
          <span>Target: ${fmtShort(state.data.settings.target)}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="progress"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${Math.min(t.targetPct * 100, 100)}%"></div></div>
        <div style="margin-top: 12px;">
          ${ms(true, false, 'Mulai catat keuangan rutin', '100%')}
          ${ms(t.debts === 0, t.debts > 0 && t.debts < t.assets, 'Bebas utang konsumtif', t.debts === 0 ? '100%' : `${Math.max(0, 100 - t.debtRatio * 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
          ${ms(t.emergencyMonths >= 6, t.emergencyMonths > 0, 'Dana darurat 6x pengeluaran', `${Math.min((t.emergencyMonths / 6) * 100, 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
          ${ms(t.netWorth >= state.data.settings.target, t.netWorth > 0, 'Financial Freedom', `${(t.targetPct * 100).toFixed(1)}%`)}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#4ADE80"></span> Indikator Kesehatan Keuangan</div>
      <div class="grid grid-3 grid-md-3">
        <div class="health-item">
          <div class="health-circle"><canvas id="ring-savings"></canvas></div>
          <div class="health-lbl">Rasio Tabungan</div>
          <div class="health-target">Target ≥ 20%</div>
          <div class="health-status ${savingsHealth === 'good' ? 's-good' : savingsHealth === 'warn' ? 's-warn' : 's-bad'}">${savingsHealth === 'good' ? 'Sehat' : savingsHealth === 'warn' ? 'Cukup' : 'Perlu Naik'}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="health-item">
          <div class="health-circle"><canvas id="ring-debt"></canvas></div>
          <div class="health-lbl">Rasio Utang</div>
          <div class="health-target">Target ≤ 30%</div>
          <div class="health-status ${t.debtRatio <= 0.30 ? 's-good' : t.debtRatio <= 0.50 ? 's-warn' : 's-bad'}">${t.debtRatio <= 0.30 ? 'Aman' : t.debtRatio <= 0.50 ? 'Hati-hati' : 'Bahaya'}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="health-item">
          <div class="health-circle"><canvas id="ring-emergency"></canvas></div>
          <div class="health-lbl">Dana Darurat</div>
          <div class="health-target">Target ≥ 6 bln</div>
          <div class="health-status ${t.emergencyMonths >= 6 ? 's-good' : t.emergencyMonths >= 3 ? 's-warn' : 's-bad'}">${t.emergencyMonths >= 6 ? 'Sehat' : t.emergencyMonths >= 3 ? 'Cukup' : 'Kurang'}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    ${trend.length > 1 ? `
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#C084FC"></span> Trend Net Worth (${trend.length} Bulan)</div>
      <div style="height:240px;"><canvas id="chart-trend"></canvas></div>
    </div>` : ''}
  `;

  setTimeout(() => {
    drawFlowDonut(t.income, t.expense);
    drawExpenseBar(cur.expense);
    drawHealthRing('ring-savings', Math.min(t.savingsRate * 100, 100), '#4ADE80', `${(t.savingsRate*100).toFixed(0)}%`);
    drawHealthRing('ring-debt', Math.max(100 - t.debtRatio * 100, 0), '#60A5FA', `${(t.debtRatio*100).toFixed(0)}%`);
    drawHealthRing('ring-emergency', Math.min((t.emergencyMonths / 12) * 100, 100), '#FB923C', `${t.emergencyMonths.toFixed(1)}x`);
    if (trend.length > 1) drawTrend(trend);
  }, 50);
}

function ms(done, active, label, pct) {
  const cls = done ? 'm-done' : active ? 'm-active' : 'm-todo';
  const ico = done ? '✓' : active ? '⏳' : '○';
  const color = done ? '#4ADE80' : active ? '#FFD93D' : '#94A3B8';
  return `<div class="milestone ${cls}"><div class="ico">${ico}</div><div class="text">${label}</div><div class="pct" style="color:${color}">${pct}</div></div>`;
}

// ============= AI ADVISOR RENDER =============
function renderAI() {
  const a = aiAnalyze();
  const t = getTotals();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  
  const scoreColor = a.score >= 75 ? '#4ADE80' : a.score >= 50 ? '#FFD93D' : a.score >= 25 ? '#FB923C' : '#F87171';
  const scoreLabel = a.score >= 75 ? 'Sehat' : a.score >= 50 ? 'Cukup' : a.score >= 25 ? 'Perlu Perhatian' : 'Darurat';
  
  let forecastHTML = '';
  if (a.forecast) {
    forecastHTML = `
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#FFD93D"></span> 🔮 Prediksi & Skenario</div>
        <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 14px;">Estimasi kapan target Rp ${fmtShort(state.data.settings.target).replace('Rp ','')} tercapai:</p>
        <div class="grid grid-2">
          <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Sekarang</div>
            <div class="display" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 4px;">${a.forecast.base.toFixed(1)}<span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;"> thn</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,217,61,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,217,61,0.3); text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Hemat 20% lebih</div>
            <div class="display" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--accent);">${a.forecast.better.toFixed(1)}<span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;"> thn</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(74,222,128,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.3); text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Hemat 50% lebih</div>
            <div class="display" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--green);">${a.forecast.best.toFixed(1)}<span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;"> thn</span></div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(192,132,252,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(192,132,252,0.3); text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Income +20%</div>
            <div class="display" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; margin-top: 4px; color: var(--purple);">${a.forecast.ifIncomeUp.toFixed(1)}<span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;"> thn</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }
  
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="ai-hero">
      <div class="ai-title">🤖 AI Advisor</div>
      <div class="ai-sub">Analisis 100% offline — data kalian aman, tidak kemana-mana.</div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot"></span> Skor Kesehatan Keuangan</div>
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;">
        <div class="score-ring">
          <canvas id="score-ring"></canvas>
          <div class="score-text">
            <div class="score-num" style="color: ${scoreColor}">${a.score}</div>
            <div class="score-max">DARI 100</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 200px;">
          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 700;">Status</div>
          <div class="display" style="font-size: 28px; font-weight: 900; color: ${scoreColor}; margin: 4px 0;">${scoreLabel}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.5;">${
            a.score >= 75 ? 'Pertahankan disiplin keuangan kalian. Tinggal optimasi area tertentu untuk akselerasi.' :
            a.score >= 50 ? 'Fondasi sudah ada, tapi beberapa hal perlu perbaikan. Cek rekomendasi aksi di bawah.' :
            a.score >= 25 ? 'Beberapa indikator perlu perhatian. Mulai dari aksi prioritas #1, satu per satu.' :
            'Saatnya action mode. Fokus ke 1-2 hal dulu — momentum kecil > stuck mikirin semua.'
          }</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    ${a.strengths.length > 0 ? `
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#4ADE80"></span> ✨ Yang Sudah Bagus</div>
        ${a.strengths.map(s => `
          <div class="insight-item insight-good">
            <div class="i-ico">${s.icon}</div>
            <div class="i-body"><div class="i-title">${s.title}</div><div class="i-text">${s.text}</div></div>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
    ` : ''}
    
    ${a.weaknesses.length > 0 ? `
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#FB923C"></span> ⚠️ Yang Perlu Diperbaiki</div>
        ${a.weaknesses.map(w => `
          <div class="insight-item insight-${w.severity || 'warn'}">
            <div class="i-ico">${w.icon}</div>
            <div class="i-body"><div class="i-title">${w.title}</div><div class="i-text">${w.text}</div></div>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
    ` : ''}
    
    ${a.actions.length > 0 ? `
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-title"><span class="dot"></span> 🎯 Rekomendasi Aksi (Prioritas)</div>
        ${a.actions.map((act, i) => `
          <div class="action-card">
            <div class="a-title"><span class="a-num">${i+1}</span>${act.title}</div>
            <div class="a-desc">${act.desc}</div>
            <div class="a-impact">📊 ${act.impact}</div>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
    ` : ''}
    
    ${forecastHTML}
    
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#60A5FA"></span> 💬 Tanya Jawab</div>
      ${a.qa.map((item, i) => `
        <div class="qa-item" onclick="this.classList.toggle('open')">
          <div class="qa-q">${item.q} <span class="arrow">›</span></div>
          <div class="qa-a">${item.a.replace(/\n/g, '<br>')}</div>
        </div>
      `).join('')}
    </div>
    
    <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(96,165,250,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.2); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 12px;">
      <strong style="color: #60A5FA;">ℹ️ Tentang AI Advisor:</strong> Analisis ini berjalan 100% di HP kalian, tidak ada data yang dikirim ke internet. Saran bersifat umum berdasarkan prinsip keuangan personal — untuk keputusan besar, konsultasi dengan financial planner bersertifikat.
    </div>
  `;
  
  setTimeout(() => {
    drawHealthRing('score-ring', a.score, scoreColor, '');
  }, 50);
}

// ============= INCOME =============
function renderIncome() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="card">
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:0;"><span class="dot" style="background:#4ADE80"></span> Pemasukan Bulan Ini</div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div style="font-size:10px; color: var(--muted);">TOTAL</div>
          <div class="display" style="font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:#4ADE80;" id="income-total">${fmtShort(t.income)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      ${INCOME_CATS.map(c => inputRow('income', c, cur.income[c.key])).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(74,222,128,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.2); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5;">
      <strong style="color:#4ADE80;">💡 Tip:</strong> Catat semua sumber pemasukan termasuk bonus & THR. Pendapatan pasif yang konsisten adalah kunci financial freedom.
    </div>
  `;
  attachInputs('income');
}

let showBudget = false;
function renderExpense() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="card">
      <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:0;"><span class="dot" style="background:#F87171"></span> Pengeluaran Bulan Ini</div>
        <div style="text-align:right;">
          <div style="font-size:10px; color: var(--muted);">TOTAL</div>
          <div class="display" style="font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:#F87171;" id="expense-total">${fmtShort(t.expense)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="toggleBudget()" style="margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--card-2); border: none; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;">
        ${showBudget ? '▼ Sembunyikan Budget' : '▸ Tampilkan Budget (Anggaran vs Aktual)'}
      </button>
      ${EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => {
        const actual = cur.expense[c.key] || 0;
        const budget = cur.budget[c.key] || 0;
        const pct = budget > 0 ? (actual / budget) * 100 : 0;
        const over = pct > 100;
        return `
          <div>
            ${inputRow('expense', c, actual, showBudget ? budget : null)}
            ${showBudget && budget > 0 ? `
              <div style="padding: 0 12px 8px;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 10px; color: ${over ? '#F87171' : 'var(--muted)'}; margin-bottom: 3px;">
                  <span>${pct.toFixed(0)}% dari budget</span>
                  <span>${fmtShort(budget - actual)} ${over ? 'over' : 'sisa'}</span>
                </div>
                <div style="height: 4px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bg); overflow: hidden;">
                  <div style="height: 100%; width: ${Math.min(pct, 100)}%; background: ${over ? '#F87171' : c.color}; transition: width 0.5s;"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ` : ''}
          </div>
        `;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(248,113,113,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5;">
      <strong style="color:#F87171;">💡 Tip:</strong> Aturan praktis 50/30/20 — 50% kebutuhan, 30% lifestyle, 20% tabungan/investasi. Aktifkan budget untuk lihat selisih.
    </div>
  `;
  attachInputs('expense');
  if (showBudget) attachInputs('budget');
}

function toggleBudget() { showBudget = !showBudget; renderExpense(); }

function renderNetWorth() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const cur = getCurrentMonth();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="grid grid-3" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(74,222,128,0.2), rgba(74,222,128,0.05)); border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.3);">
        <div style="font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #4ADE80; margin-bottom: 4px;">Aset</div>
        <div class="display" style="font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900;">${fmtShort(t.assets)}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(248,113,113,0.2), rgba(248,113,113,0.05)); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.3);">
        <div style="font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #F87171; margin-bottom: 4px;">Utang</div>
        <div class="display" style="font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900;">${fmtShort(t.debts)}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,217,61,0.2), rgba(255,217,61,0.05)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,217,61,0.3);">
        <div style="font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #FFD93D; margin-bottom: 4px;">Net Worth</div>
        <div class="display" style="font-size: 17px; font-weight: 900;">${fmtShort(t.netWorth)}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#4ADE80"></span> Aset Kalian</div>
      ${ASSET_CATS.map(c => inputRow('assets', { ...c, color: '#4ADE80' }, cur.assets[c.key])).join('')}
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#F87171"></span> Utang yang Ditanggung</div>
      ${DEBT_CATS.map(c => inputRow('debts', { ...c, color: '#F87171' }, cur.debts[c.key])).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255,217,61,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,217,61,0.2); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5;">
      <strong style="color:#FFD93D;">💡 Tip:</strong> Update Net Worth setiap akhir bulan untuk lihat trend pertumbuhan. Yang penting trend-nya naik konsisten.
    </div>
  `;
  attachInputs('assets');
  attachInputs('debts');
}

function renderGoals() {
  const t = getTotals();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  const monthlySaving = t.surplus;
  const remaining = state.data.settings.target - t.netWorth;
  const monthsToGoal = monthlySaving > 0 ? Math.ceil(remaining / monthlySaving) : Infinity;
  const yearsToGoal = monthsToGoal / 12;
  const targetDate = new Date();
  targetDate.setMonth(targetDate.getMonth() + (monthsToGoal === Infinity ? 0 : monthsToGoal));

  let simHTML;
  if (monthlySaving <= 0) {
    simHTML = `<div style="padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; text-align: center; background: rgba(248,113,113,0.1);"><div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 6px;">⚠️</div><p style="font-size: 13px; color: #F87171;">Surplus negatif/nol. Naikkan pemasukan atau kurangi pengeluaran dulu.</p></div>`;
  } else if (remaining <= 0) {
    simHTML = `<div style="padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; text-align: center; background: rgba(74,222,128,0.15);"><div style="font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 6px;">🎉</div><p style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #4ADE80;">Target tercapai! Selamat, Kadek & Komang sudah Financial Freedom!</p></div>`;
    setTimeout(celebrate, 300);
  } else if (monthsToGoal === Infinity || monthsToGoal > 1200) {
    simHTML = `<div style="padding: 14px; border-radius: 14px; text-align: center; background: rgba(251,146,60,0.1); font-size: 13px;">Butuh waktu sangat lama. Coba naikkan tabungan bulanan atau turunkan target.</div>`;
  } else {
    const sim10 = Math.ceil(remaining / (monthlySaving * 1.1)) / 12;
    const sim25 = Math.ceil(remaining / (monthlySaving * 1.25)) / 12;
    simHTML = `
      <div style="padding: 20px; border-radius: 18px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD93D, #FB923C); color: #000; margin-bottom: 10px;">
        <div style="font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; opacity: 0.85;">Estimasi Waktu</div>
        <div class="display" style="font-size: 36px; font-weight: 900; margin: 4px 0;">${yearsToGoal >= 1 ? `${yearsToGoal.toFixed(1)} Tahun` : `${monthsToGoal} Bulan`}</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; opacity: 0.85;">Tercapai sekitar ${MONTHS_ID[targetDate.getMonth()]} ${targetDate.getFullYear()}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid grid-2">
        <div style="padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 4px;">Hemat 10% lebih</div><div style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;">${sim10.toFixed(1)} thn</div></div>
        <div style="padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 4px;">Hemat 25% lebih</div><div style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;">${sim25.toFixed(1)} thn</div></div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="card">
      <h3 class="display" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 14px;">🎯 Target Financial Freedom</h3>
      <label style="display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 6px;">Target Net Worth (Rp)</label>
      <input type="number" id="goal-target-input" value="${state.data.settings.target}" inputmode="numeric" style="width:100%; padding: 12px 14px; background: var(--card-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; color: #FFD93D; font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 14px;">
      <div style="font-size: 11px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px;"><span>Tercapai</span><span>${(t.targetPct * 100).toFixed(2)}%</span></div>
      <div class="progress" style="height: 14px;"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: ${Math.min(t.targetPct * 100, 100)}%"></div></div>
      <div class="grid grid-2" style="margin-top: 12px;">
        <div style="padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Sudah Terkumpul</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #4ADE80; margin-top: 2px;">${fmtShort(t.netWorth)}</div></div>
        <div style="padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card-2); text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);">Sisa</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #FB923C; margin-top: 2px;">${fmtShort(Math.max(remaining, 0))}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot"></span> ⏱️ Simulator Waktu</div>
      <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 14px;">Berdasarkan tabungan bulan ini (${fmtShort(monthlySaving)}/bulan):</p>
      ${simHTML}
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#C084FC"></span> 🏆 Milestone Perjalanan</div>
      ${ms(true, false, 'Mulai mencatat keuangan', '100%')}
      ${ms(t.savingsRate >= 0.20, t.savingsRate > 0 && t.savingsRate < 0.20, 'Tingkat tabungan 20%+', `${Math.min((t.savingsRate / 0.20) * 100, 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
      ${ms(t.debts === 0, t.debts > 0 && t.debts < t.assets, 'Bebas utang konsumtif', t.debts === 0 ? '100%' : 'Dalam progres')}
      ${ms(t.emergencyMonths >= 6, t.emergencyMonths > 0, 'Dana darurat 6x pengeluaran', `${Math.min((t.emergencyMonths / 6) * 100, 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
      ${ms(t.emergencyMonths >= 12, t.emergencyMonths >= 6 && t.emergencyMonths < 12, 'Dana darurat 12x pengeluaran', `${Math.min((t.emergencyMonths / 12) * 100, 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
      ${ms(t.netWorth >= state.data.settings.target / 2, t.netWorth > 0 && t.netWorth < state.data.settings.target / 2, '50% target Financial Freedom', `${Math.min((t.targetPct / 0.5) * 100, 100).toFixed(0)}%`)}
      ${ms(t.netWorth >= state.data.settings.target, t.netWorth > 0, '🎉 FINANCIAL FREEDOM', `${(t.targetPct * 100).toFixed(1)}%`)}
    </div>
  `;
