  document.getElementById('goal-target-input').addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.data.settings.target = +e.target.value || 0;
    saveData(true);
  });
  document.getElementById('goal-target-input').addEventListener('blur', () => render());
}

function renderHistory() {
  const sorted = Object.keys(state.data.months).sort().reverse();
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  if (sorted.length === 0) {
    main.innerHTML = `<div class="card"><div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📊</div><p>Belum ada data.</p></div></div>`;
    return;
  }
  main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title"><span class="dot" style="background:#60A5FA"></span> 📅 Histori Bulanan (${sorted.length} bulan)</div>
      ${sorted.map(k => {
        const m = state.data.months[k];
        const inc = Object.values(m.income).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
        const exp = Object.values(m.expense).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
        const assets = Object.values(m.assets).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
        const debts = Object.values(m.debts).reduce((a,b)=>a+(+b||0), 0);
        const nw = assets - debts;
        const surplus = inc - exp;
        const isCurrent = k === state.currentMonth;
        return `
          <div class="history-item" onclick="goToMonth('${k}')" style="${isCurrent ? 'border: 1px solid var(--accent);' : ''}">
            <div class="top">
              <div class="name">📆 ${monthLabel(k)} ${isCurrent ? '<span style="font-size:10px; padding: 2px 6px; background: var(--accent); color: #000; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 4px;">Aktif</span>' : ''}</div>
              <div style="color: var(--muted); font-size: 16px;">›</div>
            </div>
            <div class="grid">
              <div class="col"><div class="l">Pemasukan</div><div class="v" style="color:#4ADE80">${fmtShort(inc)}</div></div>
              <div class="col"><div class="l">Surplus</div><div class="v" style="color:${surplus >= 0 ? '#4ADE80' : '#F87171'}">${fmtShort(surplus)}</div></div>
              <div class="col"><div class="l">Net Worth</div><div class="v" style="color:#FFD93D">${fmtShort(nw)}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
  `;
}

function goToMonth(k) { state.currentMonth = k; state.activeTab = 'dashboard'; render(); }

// ============= INPUT HELPERS =============
function inputRow(section, cat, value, budget) {
  return `
    <div class="input-row">
      <div class="ico" style="background: ${cat.color}20;">${cat.icon}</div>
      <div class="body">
        <div class="lbl">${cat.label}</div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:6px;">
          <input type="number" data-section="${section}" data-key="${cat.key}" value="${value || ''}" placeholder="0" inputmode="numeric">
          ${budget !== null && budget !== undefined ? `<input type="number" data-section="budget" data-key="${cat.key}" value="${budget || ''}" placeholder="Budget" inputmode="numeric" style="width: 90px; border-color: rgba(255,217,61,0.3); color: #FFD93D;">` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function attachInputs(section) {
  document.querySelectorAll(`input[data-section="${section}"]`).forEach(input => {
    input.addEventListener('input', e => {
      const key = e.target.dataset.key;
      const sec = e.target.dataset.section;
      getCurrentMonth();
      state.data.months[state.currentMonth][sec][key] = +e.target.value || 0;
      saveData(true);
      // Update header totals live
      const t = getTotals();
      const incEl = document.getElementById('income-total');
      const expEl = document.getElementById('expense-total');
      if (incEl) incEl.textContent = fmtShort(t.income);
      if (expEl) expEl.textContent = fmtShort(t.expense);
    });
    input.addEventListener('blur', () => saveData());
  });
}

// ============= CHARTS =============
function drawFlowDonut(income, expense) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-flow');
  if (!ctx) return;
  state.charts.flow = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'doughnut',
    data: { labels: ['Pemasukan', 'Pengeluaran'], datasets: [{ data: [income || 1, expense || 1], backgroundColor: ['#4ADE80', '#F87171'], borderColor: '#1A1A2E', borderWidth: 4, hoverOffset: 8 }] },
    options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, cutout: '70%', plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: c => c.label + ': ' + fmt(c.parsed) } } }, animation: { animateRotate: true, duration: 1200 } }
  });
}

function drawExpenseBar(expenses) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-expense');
  if (!ctx) return;
  const data = EXPENSE_CATS.map(c => ({ label: c.label, value: expenses[c.key] || 0, color: c.color })).filter(d => d.value > 0);
  if (data.length === 0) {
    ctx.parentElement.innerHTML = '<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📊</div><p style="font-size:13px;">Belum ada pengeluaran tercatat.</p></div>';
    return;
  }
  state.charts.expense = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: data.map(d => d.label.split(' ')[0]), datasets: [{ data: data.map(d => d.value), backgroundColor: data.map(d => d.color), borderRadius: 8, borderSkipped: false }] },
    options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: c => fmt(c.parsed.y) } } }, scales: { x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#94A3B8', font: { size: 10 } } }, y: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, ticks: { color: '#94A3B8', font: { size: 10 }, callback: v => fmtShort(v) } } }, animation: { duration: 1000, easing: 'easeOutQuart' } }
  });
}

function drawHealthRing(id, value, color, centerText) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!ctx) return;
  state.charts[id] = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'doughnut',
    data: { datasets: [{ data: [value, 100 - value], backgroundColor: [color, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)'], borderWidth: 0 }] },
    options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: true, cutout: '78%', plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { enabled: false } }, animation: { animateRotate: true, duration: 1200 } },
    plugins: centerText ? [{ id: 'centerText', afterDraw: chart => {
      const { ctx, chartArea: { left, right, top, bottom } } = chart;
      ctx.save();
      ctx.font = '900 14px Fraunces, serif';
      ctx.fillStyle = color;
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
      ctx.fillText(centerText, (left + right) / 2, (top + bottom) / 2);
      ctx.restore();
    }}] : []
  });
}

function drawTrend(trend) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('chart-trend');
  if (!ctx) return;
  state.charts.trend = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: { labels: trend.map(t => t.month), datasets: [{ data: trend.map(t => t.netWorth), borderColor: '#C084FC', backgroundColor: c => { const g = c.chart.ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 250); g.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(192,132,252,0.4)'); g.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(192,132,252,0)'); return g; }, borderWidth: 3, fill: true, tension: 0.4, pointBackgroundColor: '#FFD93D', pointBorderColor: '#1A1A2E', pointBorderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 5 }] },
    options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { callbacks: { label: c => fmt(c.parsed.y) } } }, scales: { x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#94A3B8' } }, y: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, ticks: { color: '#94A3B8', callback: v => fmtShort(v) } } }, animation: { duration: 1500, easing: 'easeOutQuart' } }
  });
}

// ============= NAV =============
function navigateMonth(dir) {
  const [y, m] = state.currentMonth.split('-').map(Number);
  const d = new Date(y, m - 1 + dir, 1);
  state.currentMonth = monthKey(d);
  if (!state.data.months[state.currentMonth]) {
    state.data.months[state.currentMonth] = emptyMonth();
    saveData(true);
  }
  render();
}

// ============= MODALS =============
function openSettings() {
  document.getElementById('set-p1').value = state.data.settings.partner1;
  document.getElementById('set-p2').value = state.data.settings.partner2;
  document.getElementById('set-target').value = state.data.settings.target;
  document.getElementById('settings-modal').classList.add('active');
}

function closeModal(id) {
  if (id === 'settings-modal') {
    state.data.settings.partner1 = document.getElementById('set-p1').value || 'Kadek';
    state.data.settings.partner2 = document.getElementById('set-p2').value || 'Komang';
    state.data.settings.target = +document.getElementById('set-target').value || 0;
    saveData();
    render();
  }
  document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active');
}

function closeWelcome() {
  document.getElementById('welcome-modal').classList.remove('active');
  state.activeTab = 'networth';
  rainHearts(8);
  render();
}

// ============= EXPORT/IMPORT/RESET =============
function exportData() {
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(state.data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `kadek-komang-keuangan-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.json`;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  showToast('📥 Data di-export!');
}

function importData(e) {
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = ev => {
    try {
      const imported = JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
      if (!imported.months || !imported.settings) throw new Error('Format tidak valid');
      if (confirm('Import akan mengganti semua data saat ini. Lanjutkan?')) {
        state.data = imported;
        saveData();
        closeModal('settings-modal');
        render();
        rainHearts(10);
      }
    } catch (err) { alert('File tidak valid: ' + err.message); }
  };
  reader.readAsText(file);
}

function resetData() {
  if (confirm('Hapus SEMUA data? Tidak bisa dibatalkan!')) {
    if (confirm('Yakin? Pastikan sudah backup dengan tombol Export.')) {
      state.data = defaultData();
      state.currentMonth = monthKey(new Date());
      saveData();
      closeModal('settings-modal');
      render();
    }
  }
}

// ============= PWA INSTALL =============
let deferredPrompt;
window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  deferredPrompt = e;
  // Show install banner only if not already in standalone mode
  if (!window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches) {
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('install-banner').classList.add('show'), 3000);
  }
});

function installPWA() {
  if (!deferredPrompt) {
    alert('Untuk pasang sebagai aplikasi:\n\nAndroid (Chrome): Menu (⋮) → "Tambahkan ke layar utama"\n\niPhone (Safari): Share (□↑) → "Add to Home Screen"');
    return;
  }
  deferredPrompt.prompt();
  deferredPrompt.userChoice.then((choice) => {
    if (choice.outcome === 'accepted') {
      rainHearts(15);
      showToast('✓ Aplikasi terpasang!');
    }
    deferredPrompt = null;
    document.getElementById('install-banner').classList.remove('show');
  });
}

// ============= INIT =============
document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(tab => {
  tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state.activeTab = tab.dataset.tab;
    render();
  });
});

// Service Worker (registered from inline blob for single-file PWA)
if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    const swCode = `
      const CACHE = 'kk-finance-v1';
      self.addEventListener('install', e => {
        e.waitUntil(caches.open(CACHE).then(c => c.addAll(['./', location.href])));
        self.skipWaiting();
      });
      self.addEventListener('activate', e => {
        e.waitUntil(self.clients.claim());
      });
      self.addEventListener('fetch', e => {
        if (e.request.method !== 'GET') return;
        e.respondWith(
          caches.match(e.request).then(cached => {
            if (cached) return cached;
            return fetch(e.request).then(resp => {
              if (resp && resp.status === 200) {
                const clone = resp.clone();
                caches.open(CACHE).then(c => c.put(e.request, clone)).catch(()=>{});
              }
              return resp;
            }).catch(() => caches.match('./'));
          })
        );
      });
    `;
    const blob = new Blob([swCode], { type: 'application/javascript' });
    const swUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    navigator.serviceWorker.register(swUrl)
      .then(reg => console.log('[SW] Registered'))
      .catch(err => console.error('[SW] Failed:', err));
  });
}

// Handle URL shortcut
const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
const initialTab = urlParams.get('tab');
if (initialTab && ['dashboard','income','expense','networth','goals','history','ai'].includes(initialTab)) {
  state.activeTab = initialTab;
}

// Load
const wasLoaded = loadData();
if (!wasLoaded) {
  document.getElementById('welcome-modal').classList.add('active');
  setTimeout(() => rainHearts(15), 300);
}
render();

// Easter egg: Click counter on net worth
let nwClicks = 0;
document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  if (e.target.closest('.hero-balance')) {
    nwClicks++;
    if (nwClicks === 5) {
      celebrate();
      showToast('Kadek & Komang · forever');
      nwClicks = 0;
    }
  }
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
